{% if page.meta and page.meta.hide %} {% if "navigation" in page.meta.hide and "navigation.tertiary" in features %} {% set hide_nav = true %} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% if not hide_nav == true %} {% endif %} {% if "navigation.tabs" in features %} {% include "partials/tabs.html" %} {% endif %}
{% block search_box %} {% if "code-siemens-code-docs-theme/search" in config.plugins or "material/search" in config.plugins %} {% include "partials/search.html" %} {% endif %} {% endblock %} {% if config.theme.palette %} {% if not config.theme.palette is mapping %} {% include "partials/palette.html" %} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% if not config.theme.palette is mapping %} {% include "partials/javascripts/palette.html" %} {% endif %} {% if config.extra.alternate %} {% include "partials/alternate.html" %} {% endif %}
